meta.name: CVERiskPilot
meta.subtitle: Enterprise Release Tracker
meta.rolloutDescription: 34-54 weeks from kickoff to enterprise-ready production. Each gate requires acceptance criteria before advancing.

phases.title: Phase 1: MVP
phases.description: Core value loop: Upload > Enrich > Triage > Report

tasks.name: Google OIDC sign-in
tasks.detail: Primary auth via Google Identity Platform

tasks.name: Email/password fallback
tasks.detail: For users without Google accounts

tasks.name: TOTP MFA
tasks.detail: Standard 2FA (passkeys deferred)

tasks.name: Org creation on signup

tasks.name: 3 roles: Owner, Analyst, Viewer

tasks.name: Redis server-side sessions

tasks.name: Scan upload (drag & drop)

tasks.name: Nessus XML parser

tasks.name: CSV parser

tasks.name: JSON parser

tasks.name: CycloneDX parser

tasks.name: Streaming parse via Pub/Sub

tasks.name: Dedup by CVE+asset

tasks.name: Finding to VulnerabilityCase grouping
tasks.detail: Two-object model per reference report

tasks.name: Raw artifact stored in GCS

tasks.name: Redis enrichment cache (24h TTL)

tasks.name: Risk score computation
tasks.detail: CVSS + EPSS + KEV combined score

tasks.name: Bulk status update

tasks.name: Basic text search
tasks.detail: CVE ID and title search via tsvector

tasks.detail: XML API v2, cursor-based pagination via id_min. Reuses existing Qualys parser XML patterns.

tasks.detail: OAuth2 client credentials + FQL filter queries, cursor pagination (400/page).

tasks.detail: API key auth, page-based pagination, asset-first then per-asset vulns.

tasks.name: Sync history + connector health dashboard

phases.title: Phase 7: Production Hardening & Gaps
phases.description: Remaining gaps to close before MSSP enterprise customers can purchase

milestones.title: Critical: Wire UI to Real APIs

tasks.name: Wire findings list to real /api/findings
tasks.detail: App page uses mock data; real API with cursor pagination exists — just needs fetch()

tasks.name: Wire TOTP MFA into login flow
tasks.detail: TOTP code in packages/auth/src/mfa; login route has placeholder comments

tasks.name: Fix worker service
tasks.detail: Cloud Run worker fails: dist/worker.js missing in standalone build

tasks.name: Cloud Build auto-deploy trigger
tasks.detail: Pipelines work manually; auto-trigger on push to main not configured

tasks.name: Remove build error suppression
tasks.detail: next.config.js has ignoreBuildErrors + ignoreDuringBuilds — fix underlying type/lint errors

tasks.name: Passkeys/WebAuthn
tasks.detail: Passwordless auth for enterprise — code in 2.0 legacy, not yet ported

tasks.name: PDF export (react-pdf)
tasks.detail: Executive summary + remediation plan PDF generation — code in 1.x, not ported

tasks.name: Vertex AI integration
tasks.detail: Route Claude via Google Vertex AI for cloud-managed billing

tasks.name: Custom AI prompts per org
tasks.detail: Org-specific remediation guidance + code framework preferences

tasks.name: Cloud CDN configuration
tasks.detail: Cache static assets + API responses at edge

tasks.name: PgBouncer deployment
tasks.detail: Connection pooling code exists in db-scale; not configured in GCP

tasks.name: Read replica deployment
tasks.detail: Read/write split code exists; no replica in Cloud SQL yet

tasks.name: Materialized views deployment
tasks.detail: Dashboard aggregate caching strategy exists; not applied to prod DB

tasks.name: Pub/Sub pipeline upgrade
tasks.detail: Replace fire-and-forget with multi-stage Pub/Sub (scan/enrich/case/ai/notify)

tasks.name: Cloud Armor production mode
tasks.detail: All 23 OWASP rules in preview — need tuning + enforcement

tasks.name: Cloud Monitoring alerts
tasks.detail: Error rate, P95 latency, uptime alert policies not configured

tasks.name: Parser fuzzing tests
tasks.detail: Fuzz test all 11 parsers with malformed inputs

tasks.name: SLSA provenance attestations
tasks.detail: Signed releases + build provenance for supply chain security

tasks.name: 80% test coverage
tasks.detail: NFR target: 80% lines, 80% functions, 65% branches

phases.title: Phase 8: Audit Remediation & Gap Closure
phases.description: Fix all security, wiring, and completeness gaps found during full-stack audit

milestones.title: Security: Add Auth to Unprotected Routes

tasks.name: Add auth to /api/cases/[id]/assign
tasks.detail: PUT handler missing getServerSession() — unauthenticated case reassignment

tasks.name: Add auth to /api/assets
tasks.detail: GET & POST have zero auth checks

tasks.name: Add auth to /api/audit-logs
tasks.detail: GET has zero auth checks

tasks.name: Add auth to /api/exceptions
tasks.detail: GET & POST missing session check + org membership validation

tasks.name: Add auth to /api/export/bulk
tasks.detail: POST has no session check

tasks.name: Add auth to /api/connectors
tasks.detail: GET & POST missing auth

tasks.name: Fix /api/notifications/count user scoping
tasks.detail: Accepts userId param without verifying it matches authenticated user

tasks.name: Add auth to /api/compliance/frameworks/[id]
tasks.detail: No auth — anyone can assess compliance for any org

tasks.name: Fix webhook-settings endpoint paths
tasks.detail: Component calls /api/webhooks but routes are at /api/webhooks/config/, /test/, /deliveries/

tasks.name: Create /api/settings/notifications
tasks.detail: notification-preferences.tsx calls this but it doesn't exist

tasks.name: Create /api/settings/org-profile
tasks.detail: org-profile.tsx calls GET/POST but route doesn't exist

tasks.name: Create /api/settings/integrations/jira
tasks.detail: jira-settings.tsx calls /jira and /jira/test — neither exist

milestones.title: Data: Replace Mock Data & Hardcoded Values

tasks.name: Wire case-detail.tsx to real APIs
tasks.detail: Imports getFindingsForCase, getAssetById, getStatusChangesForCase, mockUsers from mock-findings

tasks.name: Wire finding-detail.tsx to real APIs
tasks.detail: Imports getCaseForFinding, getAssetById from mock-findings

tasks.name: Replace 5 hardcoded demo-org values
tasks.detail: client-switcher.tsx:33, portfolio-dashboard.tsx:47, team-management.tsx:52,65,89

tasks.name: Replace 2 hardcoded org-default fallbacks
tasks.detail: poam-view.tsx:52, framework-dashboard.tsx:93

tasks.name: Add ID validation to 6 dynamic routes
tasks.detail: cases/[id], findings/[id], clients/[id], exceptions/[id], connectors/[id], keys/[id]

tasks.name: Add tier validation to /api/billing/upgrade
tasks.detail: toUpperCase() without enum check

tasks.name: Add audit logging to assign + connectors
tasks.detail: /api/cases/[id]/assign and /api/connectors missing audit trail

tasks.name: Cap export limit in /api/export/bulk
tasks.detail: take: 100000 potential DoS — cap at 10000 with pagination

phases.title: Phase 9: Deep Audit Remediation (256 Findings)
phases.description: Fix all 256 findings from the 8-track deep codebase audit: security (auth bypass, SSRF, MFA, CSRF, IDOR), build (stale Prisma, hidden type errors, missing deps), packages (broken exports, stubs), UI (dead components, mock data, broken endpoints), and infrastructure (Dockerfile, Cloud Build, database indexes).

tasks.name: Remove /api/ from middleware PUBLIC_PREFIXES
tasks.detail: Middleware marks ALL API paths public — any route forgetting auth is wide open

tasks.name: Auth-gate 20+ unprotected API routes
tasks.detail: connectors, privacy/export, Jira, ServiceNow, portfolio, SLA, cases/build, reports, compliance

tasks.name: Fix MFA bypass (server-side nonce validation)
tasks.detail: tempSessionId leaks userId, nonce never validated server-side

tasks.name: Replace MFA mock setup endpoint
tasks.detail: Returns hardcoded secret, accepts any code, no auth check

tasks.name: Add SSRF protection to webhook/connector/integration URLs
tasks.detail: No private IP, metadata server, or internal URL validation

tasks.name: Wire CSRF module + encrypt secrets at rest
tasks.detail: CSRF exists but unused; webhook/Jira/ServiceNow creds stored plaintext

milestones.title: Wave 18: Build & Type System Fixes (13 tasks)

tasks.name: Run prisma generate + fix 33+ type errors
tasks.detail: Stale Prisma client is root cause of most type errors across web, worker, connectors

tasks.name: Fix worker crash + add missing deps
tasks.detail: Worker imports non-existent prisma singleton, has zero declared dependencies

tasks.name: Add 8 missing workspace deps to web package.json
tasks.detail: ai, billing, compliance, db-scale, parsers, scan, storage, streaming — imported but undeclared

tasks.name: Remove ignoreBuildErrors + ignoreDuringBuilds from next.config.js
tasks.detail: Hides 24 type errors and 267 ESLint errors — only remove after all upstream fixes

tasks.name: Fix agents barrel export (currently empty)
tasks.detail: export {} hides all agent functionality — orchestrator, runner, 5 prompts inaccessible

tasks.name: Build scan CLI + fix auth/domain barrel exports
tasks.detail: Scan dist/ doesn't exist; auth missing password-policy/ip-allowlist; domain missing 5 models

tasks.name: Implement worker stub handlers + streaming pipeline stages
tasks.detail: 4/6 worker handlers are stubs; streaming default stages return null for all enrichment

tasks.name: Fix AI tier limits, Vertex client, structured logging across 22+ files
tasks.detail: FOUNDERS_BETA falls to FREE limit; placeholder API key; raw console.log everywhere

milestones.title: Wave 20: UI Wiring & UX Fixes (14 tasks)

tasks.name: Fix broken API endpoint paths (3 components)
tasks.detail: assign-dropdown, comment-thread call wrong URL; connector wizard test route wrong path

tasks.name: Replace 9 mock-data API routes with real queries
tasks.detail: Assets, audit-logs, users, pipeline/scans, ops routes all return hardcoded arrays

tasks.name: Wire 9 orphaned components into pages
tasks.detail: ai-remediation, comments, assignment, exception form into case-detail; mfa-setup, onboarding-wizard into pages

tasks.name: Add error pages, pagination, accessibility, demo parity
tasks.detail: No error boundaries; 5 lists without pagination; 8 confirm() dialogs; 7 missing demo pages

tasks.name: Fix Dockerfile + Cloud Build (missing packages, prisma generate, ingress)
tasks.detail: scan/connectors not copied; no prisma generate step; Cloud Build overrides Terraform ingress

tasks.name: Add onDelete cascades + missing indexes to Prisma schema
tasks.detail: Nearly all relations missing cascades; no indexes on high-frequency query columns

tasks.name: Add organizationId to 5 models + PipelineScan model
tasks.detail: Notification, RiskException, Ticket, Comment, WorkflowLineage have no tenant isolation

tasks.name: Fix deployment config (worker port, env vars, DB password, in-memory stores)
tasks.detail: Port mismatch, 20+ missing env vars, DB password in TF state, unbounded in-memory Maps

kpis.notes: Scan complete to case creation (100 findings)

orchestrator.title: Multi-Agent Build Orchestrator
orchestrator.description: Orchestrator coordinates subagents across parallel waves. Each wave unlocks the next. Agents work in isolated worktrees and hand results back to the orchestrator for integration.

agents.name: Orchestrator
agents.role: Planning, schema design, integration, code review

agents.name: Infra Agent
agents.role: Terraform, Cloud Run, GCS, Redis, CI/CD

agents.name: UI Agent
agents.role: Dashboard, findings list, detail views, layout

waves.title: Wave 12: Platform Operations Dashboard (@cveriskpilot.com Internal)
waves.description: Internal staff dashboard for @cveriskpilot.com employees — customer monitoring, usage analytics, billing ops, support tooling. Separate from customer-facing app. Pattern: most MSSPs/SaaS run an internal 'admin console' (like Stripe Dashboard, Datadog Internal, ConnectWise Command) that is domain-gated and inaccessible to customers. Typical approaches: (1) separate route group/subdomain (ops.cveriskpilot.com), (2) domain-gated access (@company.com email only), (3) elevated 'platform' roles distinct from customer roles, (4) read-heavy with impersonation for support. Research Salesforce Lightning Console, Palo Alto Cortex XSOAR partner view, Arctic Wolf partner portal, and Datto Autotask for MSSP-specific patterns.

tasks.name: Route group (ops) with distinct violet-themed layout + ops sidebar (9 nav items)
Middleware domain gate: @cveriskpilot.com emails only for /ops/* and /api/ops/*
Customer list: sortable table, tier/status filters, CSV export, pagination
Customer detail: 4-tab view (overview, users, billing w/ Stripe link, scan history)
Usage analytics: scans/day bars, storage by org, format distribution, tier breakdown
Billing ops: MRR/ARR KPIs, tier distribution bar, overdue invoices, recent transactions
Impersonation: reason modal + audit checkbox, amber banner with live timer, API + audit log
Platform health: service grid (5 services), DB pool/replica, Redis metrics, 30s auto-refresh
Feature flags: 10 flags with global/per-org toggles, expandable overrides, optimistic UI
Onboarding pipeline: funnel visualization, milestone badges, conversion KPIs, recent signups
Staff audit log: filterable table (email, action, date range), color-coded action badges
Announcements: CRUD with type/status, live banner preview, activate/expire controls

waves.title: Wave 14: Competitive Edge — Exploit Gaps in Nucleus/Vulcan/Dazz/Brinqa
waves.description: Market research (2026-03-28) across Nucleus Security, Vulcan Cyber/Brinqa, Dazz, and competitor reviews (G2, TrustRadius, PeerSpot, Reddit) identified 9 strategic gaps no competitor fills well. This wave prioritizes the differentiators that win deals: native compliance/POAM, AI remediation UX, self-serve onboarding, MSSP portal, and modern settings completion. Competitive intelligence: Nucleus charges $10-13/asset (enterprise-only, no SMB), Vulcan/Brinqa $8-15/asset (remediation focus but weak compliance), Dazz $12-18/asset (cloud-native only, no on-prem scanner support). All competitors lack native POAM generation, FedRAMP mapping, CMMC controls, and AI-powered remediation guidance.

tasks.name: Compliance hardening: Add CMMC Level 2 + FedRAMP Moderate framework configs to packages/compliance/
tasks.detail: Gap: No competitor does native CMMC/FedRAMP. Nucleus, Vulcan, Dazz all require external GRC tools.

tasks.name: POAM export: Generate FedRAMP-formatted POAM spreadsheet (XLSX) from vulnerability cases
tasks.detail: Gap: Nucleus has zero POAM capability. Biggest differentiator for DoD/FedGov buyers.

tasks.name: Compliance-to-finding mapping: Link CVEs to NIST 800-53 controls in framework dashboard
tasks.detail: Gap: Competitors handle 'find and fix' but not 'prove compliance'.

tasks.name: AI remediation UX: Add 'AI Advisory' panel to case detail with structured output (risk, actions, fix, verification)
tasks.detail: Gap: No competitor has AI-powered remediation. Nucleus/Vulcan rely on manual playbooks.

tasks.name: AI triage confidence scores: Show Claude confidence level + reasoning on auto-triage decisions
tasks.detail: Gap: Competitors use static rules for prioritization. AI triage with explainability is unique.

tasks.name: Self-serve signup flow: Stripe Checkout integration for Free → Pro upgrade without sales call
tasks.detail: Gap: Nucleus, Vulcan, Dazz all require 'contact sales'. CVERiskPilot offers self-serve from $0.

tasks.name: Wire remaining settings tabs: SSO/SAML config, API key management, service accounts, IP allowlist, scanner connectors
tasks.detail: Gap: Competitors criticized for limited configurability. 5 settings components exist but aren't rendered.

tasks.name: RBAC enforcement in UI: Role-aware sidebar (hide/show by role), page guards, client switcher scoping
tasks.detail: Gap: Nucleus MSSP multi-tenant is an add-on/upcharge with poor UX. Ours is built-in from day one.

tasks.name: MSSP client portal polish: Client-facing read-only views (findings, cases, compliance), branded login
tasks.detail: Gap: MSSPs report wanting better client-facing portals. Nucleus portal UX criticized in reviews.

tasks.name: Jira bidirectional sync: Push cases to Jira, pull status updates back (config UI already built)
tasks.detail: Gap: Nucleus ServiceNow integration criticized as rigid. Vulcan has better remediation orchestration.

tasks.name: ServiceNow bidirectional sync: Match/exceed Nucleus's ITSM integration with more config flexibility
tasks.detail: Gap: Nucleus users want more ServiceNow config options. This is table stakes for enterprise.

tasks.name: Executive PDF reports: Customizable templates (not rigid like competitors), scheduled delivery
tasks.detail: Gap: Nucleus reporting described as rigid. Users want customizable report templates.

tasks.name: Asset inventory enrichment: CMDB-style asset management with business context, not just scanner-derived
tasks.detail: Gap: Nucleus asset inventory is secondary/scanner-derived. Users want single source of truth.

tasks.name: Production stress test validation: Run 500-analyst Cloud Build stress test on GCP (cloudbuild-stress.yaml)
tasks.detail: Validates PgBouncer, connection pooling, Cloud Run autoscaling fixes from bottleneck analysis.

tasks.name: Transparent pricing page: Public pricing at /pricing with tier comparison (Free/$0, Founders/$49, Pro/$149, Enterprise/Custom, MSSP/Custom)
tasks.detail: Gap: Every competitor hides pricing behind 'contact sales'. Transparent pricing wins SMB trust.

tasks.name: SDVOSB/Veteran-owned badge + FedGov landing page for procurement advantage
tasks.detail: Unique: 100% Veteran Owned, Texas LLC. Legitimate procurement advantage for DoD/FedGov contracts.

waves.title: Wave 15: Scanner API Connectors (5 Scanners)
waves.description: API-based connectors that pull vulnerability data directly from scanner platforms. Replaces manual file upload for enterprise customers. Adapters: Tenable.io, Qualys VMDR, CrowdStrike Falcon Spotlight, Rapid7 InsightVM, Snyk. Uses AsyncGenerator streaming, rate-limited HTTP client, encrypted credentials, and reuses existing CanonicalFinding pipeline. Full design: docs/scanner-api-connectors-plan.md

tasks.name: Prisma schema: SyncJob + SyncLog models, extend ScannerConnector (syncInterval, lastSyncAt, scannerConfig, isApiConnector)
tasks.detail: Phase 1 Foundation. New SyncJobStatus enum (PENDING→COMPLETED/FAILED/CANCELLED).

tasks.name: packages/connectors scaffold: types.ts (ScannerAdapter, ScannerAdapterConfig, DecryptedCredentials), adapter-registry.ts
tasks.detail: Phase 1 Foundation. Core interfaces for all 5 adapters.

tasks.name: HttpClientWithRetry: token bucket rate limiter, exponential backoff, circuit breaker (5-failure threshold)
tasks.detail: Phase 1 Foundation. Configurable per-scanner rate limits.

tasks.name: credential-resolver.ts: decrypt authConfig using @cveriskpilot/auth AES-256-GCM encryption
tasks.detail: Phase 1 Foundation. In-memory only, never logged.

tasks.name: sync-orchestrator.ts: SyncJob lifecycle, adapter→normalize→dedup→enrich→buildCases pipeline, progress tracking
tasks.detail: Phase 1 Foundation. Reuses job-consumer.ts pipeline.

tasks.name: Tenable.io adapter: export-create→poll→download-chunks flow, X-ApiKeys auth, 35 req/min, incremental via last_found
tasks.detail: Phase 2. First adapter. Export UUID polling pattern.

tasks.name: Qualys VMDR adapter: XML API v2, basic auth, cursor via id_min, detection_updated_since incremental
tasks.detail: Phase 2. Reuses packages/parsers qualys.ts XML patterns.

tasks.name: CrowdStrike Falcon Spotlight adapter: OAuth2 client credentials, FQL filters, after cursor, 50 req/min
tasks.detail: Phase 3. Auto-refresh token before expiry.

tasks.name: Rapid7 InsightVM adapter: X-Api-Key auth, page-based pagination, asset-first vuln fetch, 60 req/min
tasks.detail: Phase 3. High asset count environments need parallel fetches.

tasks.name: Snyk adapter + webhook receiver: token auth, cursor pagination, HMAC webhook validation, real-time push
tasks.detail: Phase 3. Only scanner with webhook push support.

tasks.name: 5 mappers: scanner-specific vuln → CanonicalFinding (tenable, qualys, crowdstrike, rapid7, snyk)
tasks.detail: Phase 2-3. Contract tests validate CanonicalFinding conformance.

tasks.detail: Phase 4. Single 5-min tick → fan-out to due connectors.

tasks.detail: Phase 4. Manual sync trigger via POST /api/connectors/[id]/sync.

tasks.detail: Phase 5. Form adapts per scanner type.

tasks.detail: Phase 5. Paginated, filterable, real-time status.

tasks.name: Extend connector-settings.tsx with 'Agent | API' tab layout
tasks.detail: Phase 5. Existing agent connectors unchanged.

tasks.detail: Phase 2-6. Per-adapter fixtures + full sync flow integration tests.

waves.title: Wave 16: Pipeline Compliance Scanner — GitHub/GitLab CI Integration
waves.description: Codebase compliance scanning via CI/CD pipelines. Bridges DevSecOps and GRC — no competitor maps pipeline scan findings to compliance frameworks or auto-generates POAM entries from code changes. GitHub Action + GitLab CI component ingests SARIF/SBOM from existing tools (Semgrep, Trivy, Grype, CodeQL), maps findings to NIST 800-53/CMMC/SOC2/FedRAMP controls, posts compliance-aware PR comments, and blocks merges on policy violations. Also includes a CLI for local developer scanning and IaC/secrets detection.

tasks.name: Pipeline scan API: POST /api/pipeline/scan (accepts SARIF, CycloneDX SBOM, Trivy JSON; auth via crp_* API key)
tasks.detail: New API route for CI/CD results ingestion. Returns compliance mapping, pass/fail verdict, affected controls list, POAM entries created.

tasks.name: CWE-to-compliance control mapping engine (CWE → NIST 800-53 → CMMC/SOC2/FedRAMP/OWASP ASVS)
tasks.detail: Core mapping database: ~150 CWE→control mappings. CWE-79→SI-2/SI-3, CWE-89→SI-10, CWE-798→IA-5, CWE-502→SI-10, etc.

tasks.name: GitHub Action: cveriskpilot/compliance-scan-action (composite action, marketplace-ready)
tasks.detail: Runs Semgrep+Trivy in container, uploads SARIF+SBOM to API, posts PR comment with compliance summary, sets check status pass/fail.

tasks.name: GitLab CI component: .cveriskpilot-scan.yml include template
tasks.detail: GitLab CI include template. Same flow as GitHub Action but uses GitLab MR notes API for comments. Supports GitLab.com + self-hosted.

tasks.name: PR/MR compliance comment formatter (Markdown template for GitHub + GitLab)
tasks.detail: Structured markdown: severity summary table, affected compliance controls, new POAM entries, pass/fail badge, link to dashboard.

tasks.name: CLI tool: npx @cveriskpilot/scan (local developer scanning pre-push)
tasks.detail: Scans deps (SBOM), secrets, IaC. Shows compliance impact in terminal. Uploads to CVERiskPilot dashboard via API key. Exit code for git hooks.

tasks.name: Pipeline policy engine: per-org compliance thresholds, framework selection, block/warn rules
tasks.detail: Org admins configure which frameworks to enforce, severity thresholds for blocking PRs, auto-exception rules, grace periods.

tasks.name: Auto-POAM generation from pipeline compliance failures
tasks.detail: When pipeline finds compliance-affecting vulns that aren't blocked, auto-create POAM entries with milestones. Links to PR/commit SHA.

tasks.name: SBOM generation + supply chain compliance mapping (NIST SSDF practices, SLSA verification)
tasks.detail: Generate CycloneDX SBOM during scan. Map dependencies to SSDF practices (PO.1, PS.1, PW.4). Verify SLSA provenance attestations.

tasks.name: Secrets detection scanner (regex + entropy-based, maps to IA-5/SC-12 controls)
tasks.detail: Detect hardcoded credentials, API keys, tokens, private keys. Map to IA-5 (Authenticator Mgmt), SC-12 (Key Mgmt), SC-28 (Data at Rest).

tasks.name: IaC compliance scanner (Terraform, CloudFormation, Kubernetes manifests → CIS + NIST controls)
tasks.detail: Check IaC against CIS benchmarks mapped to compliance controls. SC-7 (Boundary Protection), AC-4 (Information Flow), AU-2 (Audit Events).

tasks.name: Pipeline dashboard: /pipelines page (scan history, compliance trends, top failing controls)
tasks.detail: New app page: scan history table, pass/fail rate chart, most-violated controls leaderboard, repo-level drill-down.

tasks.name: Developer compliance scorecard: per-repo compliance score by framework
tasks.detail: Repo-level view: compliance score per framework (SOC2: 87%, CMMC: 92%), open findings mapped to controls, remediation progress.

tasks.name: Webhook + Slack/Teams notifications for pipeline scan results
tasks.detail: Push scan results to Slack/Teams channels. Alert on compliance failures. Configurable per-org notification preferences.

tasks.name: Technical documentation: architecture guide, setup docs, API reference, compliance mapping reference
tasks.detail: Comprehensive docs: GitHub Action setup, GitLab CI setup, CLI usage, API reference, CWE→control mapping tables, examples.

tasks.name: Marketing assets: X posts, OG graphics, landing page copy for pipeline compliance scanner
tasks.detail: Professional social content announcing pipeline compliance scanning. Comparison graphics vs Snyk/SonarQube/Semgrep.

waves.title: Wave 17: Critical Security Fixes (Auth, SSRF, MFA)
waves.description: Fix all CRITICAL security findings from the deep audit. Middleware auth bypass, 20+ unauthenticated API routes, MFA bypass, SSRF vectors, CSRF wiring. These are showstoppers — no deployment until resolved.

tasks.name: Remove /api/ from middleware PUBLIC_PREFIXES — require session for all API routes by default
tasks.detail: CRITICAL: Middleware marks ALL /api/ paths public. Any route forgetting getServerSession() is wide open. Add API auth middleware layer.

tasks.name: Add getServerSession() + org-scoping to 20+ unprotected API routes
tasks.detail: CRITICAL: connectors CRUD, privacy/export, all Jira/ServiceNow integrations, portfolio, SLA, cases/build, reports/generate, compliance/frameworks, PDF export, session/client.

tasks.name: Fix MFA flow: store tempSessionId server-side in Redis, validate nonce, never leak userId to client
tasks.detail: CRITICAL: Login returns mfa:<userId>:<nonce> to client. Verify endpoint extracts userId by string split — nonce never validated. Attacker can forge tempSessionIds.

tasks.name: Replace MFA setup mock: real TOTP secret generation, auth-gated, verify initial token properly
tasks.detail: CRITICAL: GET /api/auth/mfa/setup returns hardcoded secret JBSWY3DPEHPK3PXP. POST accepts any 6-digit code. No auth check on either.

tasks.name: Add SSRF protection: validate webhook/connector/integration URLs against private IP ranges + GCP metadata
tasks.detail: CRITICAL: Webhook URLs, connector endpoints, ServiceNow instanceUrl all accept arbitrary URLs. Can hit 169.254.x.x, 10.x.x.x, metadata.google.internal.

tasks.name: Wire CSRF module into all state-changing API routes (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE)
tasks.detail: HIGH: CSRF module exists at packages/auth/src/security/csrf.ts with timingSafeEqual but is NEVER imported or used anywhere. No crp_csrf cookie set.

tasks.name: Add RBAC enforcement to state-changing routes (teams, keys, webhooks, cases, upload, billing)
tasks.detail: HIGH: Any authenticated user (even VIEWER) can create/delete teams, API keys, webhooks, cases, upload files, modify billing. Only ~4 routes check roles.

tasks.name: Fix IDOR: add org-scoping to teams, team members, connectors, exceptions routes
tasks.detail: HIGH: teams/[id] GET/PUT/DELETE, teams/[id]/members POST/DELETE, connectors/[id], exceptions/[id] — all missing organizationId check.

tasks.name: Encrypt secrets at rest: webhook secrets, ServiceNow/Jira credentials via encryptForTenant()
tasks.detail: HIGH: Webhook signing secrets, ServiceNow passwords/clientSecrets, Jira API tokens stored as plaintext in organization.entitlements JSON.

tasks.name: Fix CSP: use nonce-based script-src instead of unsafe-inline, wire nonce into CSP directive
tasks.detail: HIGH: Production CSP sets script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'. Nonce generated but never used in CSP directive — provides zero XSS protection.

tasks.name: Fix dev-session endpoint: add NODE_ENV strict check, remove spoofable HOST header fallback
tasks.detail: HIGH: Dev-session endpoint HOST header check trivially spoofable. If NODE_ENV misconfigured in production, endpoint is accessible.

tasks.name: Add session invalidation on password change/role change/deactivation (destroyAllUserSessions)
tasks.detail: HIGH: No mechanism to invalidate all sessions for a user. Password/role changes leave existing sessions valid for 24 hours.

tasks.name: Fix ops dashboard auth: replace base64 cookie parsing with proper session validation
tasks.detail: MEDIUM: Opaque Redis session tokens bypass middleware domain gate for /ops routes. Any authenticated user can access staff dashboards.

tasks.name: Add file upload content validation (magic bytes, not just extension), sanitize filenames for path traversal
tasks.detail: HIGH: Upload validates extension only, trusts client-set MIME type. Filename used in path.join without sanitization.

tasks.name: Add audit logging for security-critical actions (login, MFA, API keys, webhooks, retention, sessions, roles)
tasks.detail: MEDIUM: Login attempts, MFA setup/verify, API key CRUD, webhook config changes, retention policy changes, role changes — none create audit logs.

tasks.name: Add CSV formula injection protection (sanitize cells starting with =, +, -, @, tab, CR)
tasks.detail: LOW: CSV export escapes commas/quotes but not formula-triggering prefixes. User-controlled fields like asset names flow into cells.

waves.title: Wave 18: Build & Type System Fixes
waves.description: Fix all build, TypeScript, dependency, and configuration issues. Stale Prisma client, hidden type errors, missing deps, worker crashes. The build currently 'passes' only because ignoreBuildErrors:true hides 24+ real type errors.

tasks.name: Standardize Redis failure handling: graceful degradation across ai, auth, enrichment

waves.title: Wave 20: UI Wiring, Dead Code, and UX Fixes
waves.description: Wire orphaned components into pages, fix broken API endpoint paths, remove mock data remnants, add error boundaries, fix accessibility gaps, and complete demo parity.

tasks.name: Fix broken API paths: assign-dropdown, comment-thread, connector wizard
tasks.detail: Fixed /api/auth/users→/api/users in 2 components. Created new /api/connectors/test endpoint for pre-save testing.

tasks.detail: Replaced 5 routes (assets, audit-logs, users, pipeline/scans, ops/overview + ops/customers) with real Prisma queries + org scoping.

tasks.name: Wire 6 orphaned components into pages
tasks.detail: Wired AiRemediation, CommentThread, AssignDropdown, RiskExceptionForm into case-detail. MfaSetup into settings. OnboardingWizard into admin.

tasks.name: Move type imports from mock-findings.ts to canonical @/lib/types
tasks.detail: Fixed imports in badges.tsx, status-workflow.tsx, bulk-actions.tsx, and demo/page.tsx.

tasks.name: Replace 'org-default' fallbacks with auth context guards
tasks.detail: Settings, compliance/poam, compliance/frameworks show 'No organization' message. Dashboard conditionally renders SlaWidget.

tasks.name: Add App Router error boundaries: not-found, error, loading at root and (app)
tasks.detail: Created 5 files: app/not-found.tsx, app/error.tsx, app/loading.tsx, app/(app)/error.tsx, app/(app)/loading.tsx.

tasks.name: Replace 14 silent catch blocks with user-visible error states
tasks.detail: Fixed catches in connector-settings (7), framework-dashboard (3), poam-view (2), notification-bell (1), notification-panel (1).

tasks.name: Add pagination to 5 list components
tasks.detail: Added client-side pagination to upload-history, api-keys, service-accounts, client-list, team-management using Pagination component.

tasks.name: /government already publicly accessible
tasks.detail: Already in PUBLIC_PATHS from Wave 17. Standalone page with NavBar/Footer, no changes needed.

tasks.name: Add 7 missing demo pages
tasks.detail: Created demo/admin, demo/clients, demo/portfolio, demo/teams, demo/compliance/frameworks, demo/compliance/poam, demo/reports/compare.

tasks.name: Fix executive report: dynamic MTTR, org name, date range
tasks.detail: MTTR computed from closed cases. Org name from props. Date range defaults to last 30 days.

tasks.name: Replace 8 confirm() dialogs with Dialog modals + add ARIA attributes
tasks.detail: Replaced confirm() in 7 files with Dialog component. Added aria-label to sidebar, header, notification-bell buttons.

tasks.name: Fix portal sidebar active state with usePathname()
tasks.detail: Extracted portal sidebar to client component using usePathname() instead of hardcoded '/portal'.

tasks.name: Add sidebar link to /ops for PLATFORM_ADMIN
tasks.detail: Added 'Ops Dashboard' nav item with platform:admin permission check between Admin and Settings.

waves.title: Wave 21: Infrastructure, Database & Deployment Fixes
waves.description: Fix Dockerfile missing packages, Cloud Build pipeline gaps, database missing indexes/cascades, Terraform mismatches, and deployment configuration issues.

tasks.name: Add packages/scan, connectors, audit to Dockerfile COPY stage
tasks.detail: Added 3 missing packages to Dockerfile COPY stage.

tasks.name: Add prisma generate step to Cloud Build pipeline
tasks.detail: Added prisma-generate step in cloudbuild.yaml before type-check/lint/test.

tasks.name: Fix Cloud Build to use services update instead of full deploy
tasks.detail: Changed gcloud run deploy to gcloud run services update — only updates image, preserves Terraform-managed config.

tasks.name: Fix Pub/Sub endpoint paths to /jobs/process
tasks.detail: Changed push subscription URL from /api/jobs/${topic} to /jobs/process matching worker handler.

tasks.name: Add onDelete cascades to all foreign key relations
tasks.detail: Added Cascade/SetNull to all relations across 15+ models. Cascade for required children, SetNull for optional refs.

tasks.name: Add 15 composite indexes to high-frequency query columns
tasks.detail: Added indexes on Finding, VulnerabilityCase, Asset, AuditLog, UploadJob for org-scoped queries.

tasks.name: Add organizationId to 5 models + update all create calls
tasks.detail: Added organizationId to Notification, RiskException, Ticket, Comment, WorkflowLineage. Updated 10 create calls across 8 files.

tasks.name: Add PipelineScan model with 3 enums
tasks.detail: Created PipelineScan model with PipelineScanType/Status/Trigger enums, 3 composite indexes, Organization relation.

tasks.name: Fix worker port to 8080 matching Cloud Run default
tasks.detail: Changed container_port from 3000 to 8080 in cloudrun.tf worker service.

tasks.name: Add 11 missing env vars to Cloud Run config
tasks.detail: Added MASTER_ENCRYPTION_KEY, SMTP_*, CRON_SECRET, WORKOS_*, GOOGLE_OIDC_CLIENT_ID to Terraform + tfvars.example.

tasks.name: Move DB password to Secret Manager
tasks.detail: Created google_secret_manager_secret for DB password with IAM binding for Cloud Run service account.

tasks.name: Add MTTR date range filter (default 90 days)
tasks.detail: Dashboard MTTR query now accepts ?mttrDays= param, defaults to 90-day window.

tasks.name: Replace in-memory stores with Redis/Prisma
tasks.detail: Export jobs → Redis with 1hr TTL. Retention policies → Prisma Organization.entitlements.

tasks.name: Add rate limiting to 7 sensitive API routes
tasks.detail: Rate limiters on keys, webhooks/config, export/findings, export/bulk, export/pdf, ai/remediation, signup.
